subject: Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor trigger 694043024/221229905 is not a GRB
body:
C. Fletcher (USRA) reports on behalf of the Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 694043024/221229905 at 21:43:39 UT
on 29 December 2022, tentatively classified as a GRB, is in fact not due
to a GRB. This trigger is likely due to particle activity."
